cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking if you follow the instructions, will you return to the starting point. The instructions are: always face forward, take 8 steps right, then take 8 steps left. The options are Yes or No. First, let me visualize this. If you're facing forward the whole time, then when you take 8 steps to the right, you move 8 units to the right. Then, when you take 8 steps to the left, you move 8 units to the left. So if you start at position 0, moving right 8 steps would take you to position +8. Then moving left 8 steps would take you back to 0. So in that case, you would be back to the starting point.
